title: Premium Brand Redesign — Synklix Professional Store Overhaul

requirements.text: Update the HeroBanner component headline to 'Smart Finds for Smarter Living' and subheadline to 'Premium Trending Products at Affordable Prices'. Keep existing CTA buttons ('Shop Now' filled #4DA6FF, 'Explore Deals' outlined), trust micro-badges (Pan India Delivery, Secure Payments, Easy Returns), Poppins font, and #4DA6FF / #111111 color scheme unchanged.

requirements.text: Add a bundle offer section on the Product Detail page (below the Add to Cart / Buy Now buttons, above the Combo Offer section). Display two bundle tiers as visually distinct cards or rows: 'Buy 2 & Get 10% OFF' and 'Buy 3 & Get 20% OFF'. Each tier shows the original per-unit price, the discounted total, and a CTA button ('Add 2 to Cart' / 'Add 3 to Cart') that adds the respective quantity of the current product to the cart. Use #4DA6FF accents and rounded-xl cards.

requirements.text: Add a prepaid conversion popup that triggers when a user adds a COD item to the cart or after 10 seconds on the Product Detail page (if not already dismissed this session). The popup headline is 'Complete Payment Online & Get Extra ₹100 OFF 🎁'. Include subtext: 'Prepaid orders get faster dispatch, free shipping, and an instant ₹100 discount. Pay online and save more!' with two CTAs: 'Pay Online & Save' (filled #4DA6FF, links to /shop) and 'Continue with COD' (text link to dismiss). Show only once per session using sessionStorage.

"Complete Payment Online & Get Extra ₹100 OFF"

Headline reads 'Complete Payment Online & Get Extra ₹100 OFF 🎁'

Shown only once per session via sessionStorage
Dismissible with Continue with COD link

Style as a compact info block with a light blue (#E8F4FF) background, small Poppins text, and #4DA6FF icon accents.

requirements.text: Perform a comprehensive premium brand redesign across all pages and components to eliminate any template or AI-generated appearance. Apply the following improvements without changing the existing color palette (#FFFFFF, #111111, #4DA6FF, Poppins): (1) Increase section vertical padding to py-20 on desktop and py-12 on mobile for all homepage sections. (2) Apply consistent section heading typography: font-bold text-3xl md:text-4xl text-[#111111] with a short colored underline accent in #4DA6FF. (3) Ensure all product cards use rounded-xl, a subtle 1px border (#E5E5E5), white background, and a hover box-shadow of '0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)'. (4) Apply rounded-full to all primary CTA buttons. (5) Improve visual hierarchy by using font-semibold for product names, font-bold for prices, and text-sm text-gray-500 for descriptors. (6) Add generous padding (px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-20) to all page content containers for a non-cramped premium feel. (7) Audit and remove any lingering gradients, heavy drop shadows, or off-brand colors across all components. (8) Ensure all section headers have consistent left-alignment with a subtitle in text-gray-500 below.

quotes: Redesign this ecommerce website for my brand Synklix into a premium, professional, high-converting Indian general store that looks like a branded retail website and not a typical dropshipping or AI-generated template.

Use a clean, modern layout with proper white space, aligned sections, soft card shadows, and consistent rounded corners. Use professional sans-serif typography with strong visual hierarchy for headings, product titles, and CTA buttons.

acceptanceCriteria: All homepage sections have py-20 desktop / py-12 mobile padding
Section headings use bold 3xl-4xl typography with #4DA6FF underline accent
All product cards have rounded-xl, subtle border, white background, and hover shadow
All primary CTA buttons use rounded-full
No gradients or off-brand colors visible anywhere
Page containers have generous horizontal padding (px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-20)
Section headers are left-aligned with gray subtitle below

requirements.text: Update Home.tsx to include the complete homepage section order: AnnouncementBar, HeroBanner, FeatureStrip, PrepaidStrategySection, FeaturedProducts, NewArrivals, WhyChooseSynklix, TrendingNow, LimitedTimeOffer, BestSellers, Testimonials, TrustBadges, PrepaidBanner, Newsletter. Ensure all sections are imported and rendered in this exact order. Remove any duplicate or out-of-order sections.

quotes:

Why Shop From Synklix
Featured Products
New Arrivals
Trending Now
Customer Testimonials
Secure Payment Icons
India-Wide Delivery Badge

acceptanceCriteria: Home.tsx renders all sections in the specified order
No sections are missing or duplicated
All imports are present and correctly referenced
Page renders without errors

requirements.text: Add a 'Secure Payment Icons' row and an 'India-Wide Delivery Badge' element to the homepage footer area above the Newsletter section. The Secure Payment Icons row should display placeholder icons for UPI, Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and Net Banking in a horizontal row with label 'We Accept'. The India-Wide Delivery Badge should show a map pin icon with text 'Delivering Across All 28 States & 8 UTs in India' styled with a #4DA6FF accent. These can be grouped in a single compact full-width band with #F8F8F8 background.

quotes:
Secure Payment Icons
India-Wide Delivery Badge

acceptanceCriteria: Secure Payment Icons row shows UPI, Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Net Banking icons with 'We Accept' label
India-Wide Delivery Badge shows map pin icon and delivery text
Both elements grouped in a compact full-width #F8F8F8 band on the homepage
Positioned above the Newsletter section

Keep the existing PrepaidBenefitsBox component pattern.

requirements.text: Update the Footer component to visually reinforce the Synklix brand: ensure the Policies column contains links to all six pages — Return Policy (/return-policy), Privacy Policy (/privacy-policy), Terms & Conditions (/terms-and-conditions), Shipping Policy (/shipping-policy), Refund Policy (/refund-policy), and About Us (/about). Add Contact Us (/contact) prominently in the Quick Links column. Maintain the existing dark (#111111) background, white text, social icons, newsletter signup, and payment icon row.

Contact Us
Shipping Policy

requirements.text: Apply mobile-first optimization across all pages: (1) Ensure all tap targets (buttons, links, nav items) are at minimum 44px height/width. (2) Ensure horizontal padding on mobile is at least px-4 on all sections. (3) Verify the sticky MobileCartBar does not overlap the floating COD Available tag, sticky Prepaid Banner, or any other fixed elements — add appropriate bottom padding/z-index stacking. (4) Ensure all text is legible at mobile viewport sizes (minimum text-sm for body copy). (5) Verify the hamburger menu drawer works correctly and all navigation links are accessible.

quotes:
Optimize entire store for:
Mobile responsiveness

acceptanceCriteria: All tap targets are at least 44px on mobile
All sections have minimum px-4 horizontal padding on mobile
No UI elements overlap incorrectly on mobile viewports
Body text is legible at mobile sizes
Hamburger menu opens/closes correctly and all nav links work

constraints: Do not change the existing color palette: #FFFFFF background, #111111 text, #4DA6FF accent, Poppins font
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the backend — all changes are frontend only
Do not break existing cart functionality, routing, or session state
nonGoals: Changing brand colors or introducing new accent colors
